name: hugging-science
tagline: Curated Hugging Face catalog skill for scientific ML — helps find/use datasets, models, and Spaces via standard HF tooling.
verdict: Well-scoped and tidy: clear triggers/anti-triggers, graceful failure handling, lean SKILL.md. HF_TOKEN is read from a local .env only to authenticate to HF itself, not sent elsewhere, and hardcoding/echoing is explicitly discouraged. Main risk for installers: it normalizes trust_remote_code=True (arbitrary code execution from remote HF model repos) with only

highlights.summary: No curl|bash pattern, but line 115 tells the agent to routinely pass trust_remote_code=True for scientific models, which makes `transformers` execute arbitrary Python shipped in the remote HF repo — f

Mostly matches its stated purpose (discovery + standard HF usage), but the routine trust_remote_code=True guidance (line 115) and unqualified default to streaming/large downloads (line 117) push sligh

Points users to 'community-submitted datasets, a few models' (line 14) and general HF Hub content; only mitigation offered is 'check the underlying HF model card' for license/access (line 66) — no int
